name: Sickly Roly Poly

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It steps in for a close-range bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it or step away before it reaches you.

attacks.name: Head Sweep
attacks.tell: It turns its front half to sweep a wide side arc.
attacks.howToAvoid: Avoid staying glued to its flanks.
attacks.notes: It often follows the bite immediately.

attacks.name: Charged Roll
attacks.tell: It curls up and rolls straight at the target.
attacks.howToAvoid: Evade it or cut the start with a perfect block.
attacks.notes: Its biggest threat in cramped terrain.

attacks.name: Launch Roll
attacks.tell: It launches into the air as a ball to land on you.
attacks.howToAvoid: Run sideways before it lands on your position.

attacks.name: Armored Heal
attacks.tell: It curls into a motionless ball instead of continuing a roll.
attacks.howToAvoid: Use the time to heal yourself or recover stamina; hitting it without strong stagger usually gives poor returns.
attacks.notes: It recovers roughly a quarter of its health.

description: A weakened version of the normal roly poly that lives in the western grasslands near harsher, dirtier areas. It is still dangerous, but less rewarding than the healthy upper-yard version.
behavior: It wanders without any special goal and only fights when provoked. It keeps the same four attacks as a normal roly poly and can also heal while curled up, with even more absurd damage reduction in that stance.
interactionWithPlayer: It retaliates as soon as you hit it. The real issue is not that it hits harder than a normal roly poly, but that it can drag the fight out if you do not punish the rolls and healing correctly.
interactionWithCreatures: It has no special interactions with other creatures and only becomes aggressive when attacked.
strategy: Busting is still the best answer. Even though it does not drop shells, you fight it almost the same way as a normal roly poly: block the bites, evade the roll, and do not waste resources trying to stop the heal unless you have strong stagger.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 110
Head Sweep: 120
Charged Roll: 140
Launch Roll: 200

specialTraits: While healing in a ball, it takes massively reduced damage and the heal does not cancel even if a stagger or critical forces it out of the stance.
